summary: Iteration 93 - Stripe Connect Integration Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - both 'Give with Solomon Pay' and 'Pay with Stripe' buttons visible when STRIPE_LIVE=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe Connect integration fully working. STRIPE_LIVE=true in backend/.env. All Stripe endpoints tested: /api/stripe/config returns stripe_live=true, mode=production. /api/stripe/checkout/giving creates real Stripe checkout URLs (https://checkout.stripe.com/...) and session_ids (cs_...). Platform fee calculation verified: 1.9% + $0.30. Minimum amount validation ($1.00) working. Webhook endpoint accepts POST gracefully. Solomon Pay regression passed - Visa 4242 card payment works.

stripe_config_endpoint.details: GET /api/stripe/config returns stripe_live=true, stripe_configured=true, platform_fee_rate='1.9% + $0.30', mode='production'

stripe_checkout_giving.details: POST /api/stripe/checkout/giving returns real Stripe checkout URL (https://checkout.stripe.com/...) and session_id (cs_...)

payment_transaction_creation.details: Checkout creates payment_transactions record with status='pending', payment_status='initiated'

checkout_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns payment status for valid sessions

webhook_endpoint.details: POST /api/webhook/stripe accepts requests and returns {received: true}

frontend_dual_buttons.details: Give page shows both 'Give with Solomon Pay' and 'Pay with Stripe' buttons when STRIPE_LIVE=true

solomon_pay_regression.details: Solomon Pay flow works - Visa 4242 saved card payment successful

mocked_apis.solomon_pay: Solomon Pay processor is MOCKED for demo mode
mocked_apis.stripe: Stripe is REAL (test mode with sk_test_emergent key)
